what_it_does: This file is a metadata record for a channel attachment in the design-assets channel; it identifies an attachment by id, type, and target image URI and records when it was added.
observations: YAML frontmatter with no body content
standouts: References a specific image asset via a URI-like target
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured metadata
Body is empty; metadata is the entire content
concerns: Target string contains a space and parentheses ('image (16)'), which may be fragile for parsing or resolution
No MIME type, file size, dimensions, or checksum provided
No alt text or descriptive label for the image
notes: A bare attachment ledger entry that points an id to a design-assets image target and records its creation time.
questions: Is the image:// target resolvable by the system?
Does attachment_type 'images' imply multiple files or a single image?
Why is there no uploader or content hash?
purpose_vs_actual: The file appears intended to catalog a channel attachment, and it does so by recording id, channel, type, target, and timestamp; purpose matches actual.
intention_signals: It seems designed to register and later retrieve an image attachment associated with the design-assets channel by storing a stable id-to-target mapping.
novelty: The target URI uses an image:// scheme and includes a parenthetical number with a space ('image (16)'), which is an unusual addressing pattern.
contribution: It contributes a timestamped, typed reference that links a channel attachment id to a specific image asset location, supporting lookup and audit of design-assets attachments.
summary_for_embedding: This file is a YAML-frontmatter attachment record for the design-assets channel that references image asset 'image://design-assets/icons/image (16)' under id att-1e1955dd with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: It was created to catalog an image attachment in the design-assets channel.
